name: token-monitor
description: Real-time token, cost, and AI limits widget with multi-device sync for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Hermes, OpenClaw, Cursor, Antigravity and more. | 为 AI Tools 打造的即时Token、成本与限额监控桌面组件，支持多设备同步
summaryZh: Real-time token, cost, and AI limits widget with multi-device sync for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Hermes, OpenClaw, Cursor, Antigravity and more. | 为 AI Tools 打造的即时Token、成本与限额监控桌面组件，支持多设备同步 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
